channel.title: Frontity Dev Command error
channel.description: (node:10920) Warning: Closing file descriptor 3 on garbage collection (Use `node --trace-warnings ...` to show where the warning was created) (node:10920) [DEP0137] DeprecationWarning: Closing a FileHandle object on garbage collection is deprecated. Please close FileHandle objects explicitly using FileHandle.prototype.close(). In the future, an error will be thrown if a file descriptor is closed during garbage collection.

item.title: Frontity Dev Command error
item.dc:creator: kasper
item.description:
Yeah, I know. But it works.

Read full topic

item.title: Frontity Dev Command error
item.dc:creator: kushwahgourav013
item.description:
It’s work but this “Warning: Closing file descriptor 3 on garbage collection” still coming.

Read full topic

item.title: Frontity Dev Command error
item.dc:creator: kasper
item.description:
I have to downgrade my node version to v12^ when I develop with frontity.

Read full topic

item.title: Frontity Dev Command error
item.dc:creator: kushwahgourav013
item.description:
(node:10920) Warning: Closing file descriptor 3 on garbage collection
(Use node --trace-warnings ... to show where the warning was created)
(node:10920) [DEP0137] DeprecationWarning: Closing a FileHandle object on garbage collection is deprecated. Please close FileHandle objects explicitly using FileHandle.prototype.close(). In the future, an error will be thrown if a file descriptor is closed during garbage collection.

Read full topic
